title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero presents how Cursor builds agentic systems across the full software development lifecycle, from bug triage and security review to growth experiments. He argues that the real bottleneck extends beyond code writing and identifies the 40% productivity plateau as a threshold that requires breaking past single-phase automation to multi-agent orchestration across SDLC stages.
